message:
feat(web): track geometry transitions and emit baseline reset markers in StepProgram

Enhance the WASM StepProgram to properly handle resize signals from
the host, particularly for DPR/zoom/font transitions that may not
change the cols/rows grid dimensions but still require a full repaint:

- Add GeometryTransition struct to capture from/to cols/rows.
- Defer model-level size update to step() event processing instead
  of applying it eagerly in push_event(). The backend event queue
  still gets immediate size sync so host-side reads stay current.
- Track pending_geometry_transition across resize events and emit
  structured JSONL markers (diff_baseline_reset, full_repaint_boundary)
  when the transition is consumed during rendering.
- Invalidate diff baseline (dbl_buf = None) on every resize signal,
  even same-size resizes, because host-side fit/DPR/zoom transitions
  can require a repaint boundary.

Tests:
- Add resize_emits_baseline_reset_and_full_repaint_markers test.
- Add same_size_resize_still_forces_repaint_boundary test.
- Add resize_oscillation_forces_full_repaint_without_stale_patch_offsets
  test verifying repeated resize cycling works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
